channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Law enforcement block road near Nancy Guthrie’s home during investigation into her disappearance
item.description: Law enforcement investigating the disappearance of “Today” show host Savannah Guthrie’s mother have blocked off a road near Nancy Guthrie’s home in Ar...

item.title: A year after border agent’s killing, 7 Zizians fight criminal charges in 3 states
See the Olympic medal count for the 2026 Winter Games
item.description: Here is a look at where the medal count stands for Team USA and other nations as the competition heats up at the 2026 Winter Olympics.

item.title: WATCH: Romantic Valentine’s Day lights in Michigan
item.description: Dearborn Peace Park West is decorated with Valentine’s Day-themed lights and displays.

item.title: Partial shutdown hits DHS: What to know about negotiations, potential impacts
item.description: Lawmakers remain at an impasse over immigration enforcement, with Department of Homeland Security funding set to run out at the end of the day Friday.

item.title: WATCH: Meet the family behind Clemmons Family Farm
item.description: As Black farmers have lost much of their land over the past century, one Vermont family is reclaiming its land for future generations.

item.title: Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson on inspiring the next generation
item.description: Supreme Court Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson was confirmed in 2022, and now she's hoping her story can inspire the next generation, sharing her experie...

item.title: TSA agents are working without pay at US airports due to another shutdown
Nancy Guthrie live updates: Law enforcement activity near Guthrie's home
item.description: The search is intensifying for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie.

item.title: An Olympic love story fit for Valentine's Day
item.description: U.S. downhill skier and gold medalist Breezy Johnson got engaged to her boyfriend Connor Watkins after he got down on one knee at the finish line of h...

item.title: Exclusive discounts from CBS Mornings Deals
item.description: On this edition of CBS Mornings Deals, we show you items that might just become essentials in your everyday life. Visit cbsdeals.com to take advantage...

item.title: U.S. hockey captain Hilary Knight's hopes for her final Olympics
item.description: "CBS Saturday Morning" caught up with U.S. hockey captain Hilary Knight who shared her hopes for her final Winter Games.

item.title: WATCH: CA Gov. Gavin Newsom calls Pres. Trump “temporary” in message to world leaders
item.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom called on world leaders attending the Munich Security Conference in Germany to think about a future without President Tru...
